title: Highlights of Seplat Energy Plc Score Card To Stakeholders
description: At Seplat Energy Plc, a leading Nigerian independent energy company listed on both the Nigerian Exchange Limited (NGX) and the London Stock Exchange (LSE), 10th Annual General Meeting (AGM) with share
html: At Seplat Energy Plc, a leading Nigerian independent energy company listed on both the Nigerian Exchange Limited (NGX) and the London Stock Exchange (LSE), 10th Annual General Meeting (AGM) with shareholders, regulators, company directors, and the media, amongst other stakeholders joining virtually.
